diffs.diff:
--- a/debug_ckpt.py
+++ b/debug_ckpt.py
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+import torch

+ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/linear_probe.pt', map_location='cpu')

+for k,v in ckpt.items():

+    if k != 'model_state_dict':

+        print(f'{k}: {v}')

+    else:

+        print(f'model_state_dict keys: {list(v.keys())[:10]}...')

+        print(f'Total keys: {len(v)}')

+

+print('\n--- clip_best.pt ---')

+ckpt2 = torch.load('checkpoints/clip_best.pt', map_location='cpu')

+for k,v in ckpt2.items():

+    if k != 'model_state_dict':

+        print(f'{k}: {v}')
